privileged_info_summary: The rect_select_delete task is a GIMP-based image editing task that downloads real landscape images from Unsplash (not synthetic). Two valid image URLs are configured as fallbacks: a 1000x667px landscape image and a 1000x666px landscape image, both confirmed to be accessible JPEG files from unsplash.com. The original image is saved to /home/ga/Desktop/landscape_rect.jpg. The verifier checks for successful rectangular deletion by detecting transparent areas in the upper 60% of the result image, with minimum dimensions of 50x50 pixels (2500px total area). Content preservation is validated to ensure non-deleted areas remain unchanged. The task.json file contains no metadata field, unlike other tasks in the benchmark.
